2604.12440.title: IAD-Unify: A Region-Grounded Unified Model for Industrial Anomaly Segmentation, Understanding, and Generation
2604.12440.paper_summary: Real-world industrial inspection requires not only localizing defects, but also explaining them in natural language and generating controlled defect edits. However, existing approaches fail to jointly support all three capabilities within a unified framework and evaluation protocol. We propose IAD-Unify, a dual-encoder unified framework in which a frozen DINOv2-based region expert supplies precise anomaly evidence to a shared Qwen3.5-4B vision-language backbone via lightweight token injection, jointly enabling anomaly segmentation, region-grounded understanding, and mask-guided generation. To enable unified evaluation, we further construct Anomaly-56K, a comprehensive unified multi-task IAD evaluation platform, spanning 59,916 images across 24 categories and 104 defect variants. Controlled ablations yield four findings: (i) region grounding is the decisive mechanism for understanding, removing it degrades location accuracy by >76 pp; (ii) predicted-region performance closely matches oracle, confirming deployment viability; (iii) region-grounded generation achieves the best full-image fidelity and masked-region perceptual quality; and (iv) pre-initialized joint training improves understanding at negligible generation cost (-0.16 dB). IAD-Unify further achieves strong performance on the MMAD benchmark, including categories unseen during training, demonstrating robust cross-category generalization.
2604.12440.paper_summary_zh: 現實世界的工業檢查不僅需要定位缺陷，還需要用自然語言解釋這些缺陷並生成受控的缺陷編輯。<lb/>然而，現有的方法未能在統一的框架和評估協議中共同支持這三種能力。<lb/>我們提出了IAD-Unify，一個雙編碼器統一框架，其中一個基於DINOv2的凍結區域專家通過輕量級的標記注入向共享的Qwen3.5-4B視覺-語言骨幹提供精確的異常證據，聯合實現異常分割、區域基礎理解和掩膜引導生成。<lb/>為了實現統一評估，我們進一步構建了Anomaly-56K，一個全面的統一多任務IAD評估平台，涵蓋了24個類別的59,916張圖像和104種缺陷變體。<lb/>受控的消融實驗得出了四個發現：(i) 區域基礎是理解的決定性機制，去除它會使位置準確性降低超過76個百分點；<lb/>(ii) 預測區域的性能與預言者相匹配，確認了部署的可行性；<lb/>(iii) 區域基礎生成實現了最佳的全圖保真度和掩膜區域的感知質量；<lb/>(iv) 預初始化的聯合訓練在可忽略的生成成本下改善了理解（-0.16 dB）。<lb/>IAD-Unify在MMAD基準上進一步實現了強勁的性能，包括訓練期間未見過的類別，顯示出強大的跨類別泛化能力。
2604.12440.author: Haoyu Zheng et.al.
2604.12440.authors: Haoyu Zheng, Tianwei Lin, Wei Wang, Zhuonan Wang, Wenqiao Zhang, Jiaqi Zhu, Feifei Shao
